spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, bottom-heavy interaction to suit dark theater environments.
spacing_and_layout.containers: max-w-md mx-auto relative min-h-screen pb-24 (mobile app), max-w-7xl w-full mx-auto (admin dashboard)

buttons.primary: bg-[#E50914] text-white hover:bg-[#F0131E] rounded-full min-h-[56px] text-lg font-medium tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(229,9,20,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 rounded-full min-h-[56px] transition-all
buttons.icon: rounded-full w-10 h-10 bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20

cards.food_item: bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-row items-center gap-4 p-4 transition-all hover:bg-white/[0.03]

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center
navigation.bottom_cart: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-[#141414]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 p-4 md:max-w-md md:mx-auto md:bottom-4 md:rounded-3xl shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-xl min-h-[56px] px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#E50914] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#E50914] transition-all

hero_cinema.description: Rows of vibrant red seats in a dimly lit movie theater. Use for landing page background with deep dark gradient overlay (bg-black/70).

popcorn.description: Premium popcorn bucket. Use for menu item.

nachos.description: Gourmet nachos. Use for menu item.

burger.description: Gourmet burger dark background. Use for menu item.

beverage.description: Dark soda. Use for menu item.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react with bold/duotone weights for a premium cinematic app feel.
The app UI MUST be absolute dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The theater environment demands absolute minimal brightness to prevent distracting other moviegoers.
Ensure the bottom cart is sticky, elevated with glassmorphism, and highly visible without obstructing the last item in the list (use pb-24 on main container).
Never use full-screen blank white overlays. Any modal, dialog, or bottom sheet must share the base charcoal/obsidian dark palette with a 1px subtle white/10 border.
All interactive elements (buttons, cart icons, menu items, seat labels) MUST include 'data-testid' for testing purposes.
Images should have a subtle gradient overlay or border radius to match the sleek UI. No harsh bright image edges.
Typography: Use Outfit for headings for a premium streaming-service feel, and Manrope for maximum readability in the dark.
